case $facts['os']['name'] {<fold text='case options' expand='true'>
  'Solaris':           {<fold text='code' expand='true'> include role::solaris </fold>} # Apply the solaris class
  'RedHat', 'CentOS':  {<fold text='code' expand='true'> include role::redhat  </fold>} # Apply the redhat class
  /^(Debian|Ubuntu)$/: {<fold text='code' expand='true'> include role::debian  </fold>} # Apply the debian class
  default:             {<fold text='code' expand='true'> include role::generic </fold>} # Apply the generic class
</fold>}

$rootgroup = $facts['os']['family'] ? {<fold text='selector options' expand='true'>
  'Solaris'          => 'wheel',
  /(Darwin|FreeBSD)/ => 'wheel',
  default            => 'root',
</fold>}
